vars.input: Bump the lockfile and run a format-only pass across the repo; no logic changes.
Scaffold a new empty docs page directory and do a rename-only cleanup of one file.
Adjust the pricing tier labels shown on the public marketing site.
Refine the subscription cancellation email copy for clarity.
Add an audit log capturing every auth event that touches regulated user data.
Migrate billing records to a new payment processor via a schema migration.
Run a security audit, then a lint-fix formatting pass across the infra configs.
